keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: Indeed search keywords (e.g. Job Titles or terms).

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Geographical search areas (e.g. 'Toronto, ON', 'New York, NY').

maxItems.title: Maximum Job Postings
maxItems.description: Limit the number of job postings to scrape in total.

postedWithin.title: Date Posted Filter
postedWithin.description: Filter jobs by when they were posted (Indeed's fromage parameter in days).

relevanceKeywords.title: Relevance Title Keywords
relevanceKeywords.description: Only keep jobs whose titles contain at least one of these keywords (case-insensitive). Leave empty to save all matching jobs.
